name: science_technology_self_efficacy
description: Measures respondents' perceived ability to understand and engage with science and technology, including self-assessed knowledge levels and agreement that science is too specialized to comprehend. Captures the subjective sense of competence in scientific and technological domains.

name: science_technology_interest_engagement
description: Measures the degree to which respondents are actively interested in and seek out information about science and technology, including frequency of media consumption, expressed interest levels, and desire to participate in related activities.

name: institutional_trust_in_science
description: Measures respondents' trust in and perceived integrity of scientific institutions and actors, including skepticism about scientists' motivations, confidence in research disciplines, and perceived commitment of Mexican scientists to society.

name: perceived_societal_value_of_science_technology
description: Measures beliefs about the practical contribution and importance of science and technology to solving Mexico's social problems, including perceived usefulness of scientific knowledge, quality of science education, and expectations for future contributions.

name: household_science_cultural_capital
description: Measures the presence of knowledge-related resources in the household that reflect exposure to scientific and educational culture, including scientific, technical, encyclopedic, and history books, as well as access to digital infrastructure such as computers and internet.
